articles.author: Andrew Cunningham
articles.title: AMD will bring its "Ryzen AI" processors to standard desktop PCs for the first time - Ars Technica
articles.description: First wave of Ryzen AI desktop CPUs targets business PCs rather than DIYers.

articles.author: Eric Zeman
articles.title: TCL's New Screen Blends Nxtpaper Tech With AMOLED, and It Looks Fantastic - PCMag
articles.description: TCL showed off a new screen concept at Mobile World Congress that brings its Nxtpaper technology to AMOLED for the first time. It also announced a new tablet, available with or without Nxtpaper.
